records.question: What third party companies are Suppliers from Kiribati with maintenance contracts starting on or before 2017-06-14 01:46:59 and ending on or before 2018-03-09 10:40:10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-06-14 01:46:59' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-09 10:40:10' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id WHERE T1.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND T1.company_type = 'Supplier' AND T2.contract_start_date <= '2017-06-14 01:46:59' AND T2.contract_end_date <= '2018-03-09 10:40:10' GROUP BY T1.company_id

records.question: What suppliers located at 9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753 with other company details exactly Kiribati have maintenance contracts starting on or before 2017-05-14 11:57:50 and ending on or after 2018-03-23 17:29:21, and supply assets where asset_details is monitor1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE maintenance_contracts.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND assets.asset_details = 'monitor1' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND maintenance_contracts.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' AND third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 WHERE T1.company_address = '9405 Leffler Hollow Apt. 753' AND T1.other_company_details = 'Kiribati' AND T1.company_type = 'Supplier' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Maintenance_Contracts AS T2 WHERE T1.company_id = T2.maintenance_contract_company_id AND T2.contract_start_date <= '2017-05-14 11:57:50' AND T2.contract_end_date >= '2018-03-23 17:29:21' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Assets AS T3 WHERE T1.company_id = T3.supplier_company_id AND T3.asset_details = 'monitor1' )

records.question: Which third party companies named McDermott Group, located at 873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286 with other details as China, have assets made by FR with model 20 tl acquired on 2017-09-19 16:15:45 and disposed on or after 2018-03-06 20:36:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '20 tl' AND third_party_companies.company_address = '873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286' AND assets.asset_acquired_date = '2017-09-19 16:15:45' AND third_party_companies.company_name = 'McDermott Group' AND assets.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-06 20:36:14' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'China' AND assets.asset_make = 'FR'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id WHERE T1.company_address = '873 Conrad Creek Apt. 286' AND T1.company_name = 'McDermott Group' AND T1.other_company_details = 'China' AND T2.asset_model = '20 tl' AND T2.asset_acquired_date = '2017-09-19 16:15:45' AND T2.asset_disposed_date >= '2018-03-06 20:36:14' AND T2.asset_make = 'FR'

records.question: Who are the third party companies supplying assets where the asset model is 20 tl?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE assets.asset_model = '20 tl'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS T1 INNER JOIN Assets AS T2 ON T1.company_id = T2.supplier_company_id WHERE T2.asset_model = '20 tl'

records.question: Which suppliers based in Kiribati have both maintenance contracts and supply assets?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT third_party_companies.company_id FROM third_party_companies
JOIN maintenance_contracts ON third_party_companies.company_id = maintenance_contracts.maintenance_contract_company_id
JOIN assets ON third_party_companies.company_id = assets.supplier_company_id
WHERE third_party_companies.company_type = 'Supplier' AND third_party_companies.other_company_details = 'Kiribati'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT TPC.company_id FROM Third_Party_Companies AS TPC JOIN Maintenance_Contracts AS MC ON TPC.company_id = MC.maintenance_contract_company_id JOIN Assets AS A ON TPC.company_id = A.supplier_company_id WHERE TPC.company_type = 'Supplier' AND TPC.other_company_details = 'Kiribati'
